title: Azu's Enhanced Zombie Variants & Fresh  Animations
description: Azu's Enhanced Zombie Variants pack with Fresh Animations compatibility!
body:
Early access / previews are available via Ko-fi with an Undead Architect tier membership ↓

---
--- ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/255401c89c4a2cf90125cc2ff49b7fbbee0afcdf_0.webp)

Azu’s Enhanced Zombie Variants is a work-in-progress resource pack that enhances the appearance and variety of zombies in Minecraft Java.

--- ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58c7ec8dced88e8637cb0360fc182e1d7ed86148.png)

This resource pack uses an OptiFine feature called Custom Entity Models (CEM) to add new models.

⚠️ IT WILL NOT WORK PROPERLY WITHOUT THIS FEATURE!

As an alternative to OptiFine, the combination of Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features can be used to enable CEM functionality.



Having issues? **- Make sure you have these settings:** The Azu’s Enhanced Zombie Variants resource pack must be at the top of the resource pack order to function correctly.** --- ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/787e6cfaa4755748d61c0b1e8657e43c361a4878_0.webp)
📜 Terms of Use – Azu’s Enhanced Zombie Variants By using this resource pack, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions. **Azu (AzuWorks)** is the creator and copyright holder of this resource pack. These terms may be changed at any time without prior notice. These terms apply **only if you intend to use this resource pack or its assets in content that will be shared publicly**. --- ### ✅ You MAY: - Use this resource pack in videos, livestreams, and other public content - Include this resource pack in modpacks or servers with proper credit - Modify the resource pack for **personal use only** (no public redistribution) - Use edited versions of the pack in videos or streams, as long as the edited version is not publicly downloadable - Remix, transform, or build upon the assets in your own resource pack, within reason, **with proper credit** - Monetize content (videos, streams, etc.) that uses this resource pack or edited assets --- ### ❌ You MAY NOT: - Redistribute this resource pack as-is - Upload this resource pack to other platforms without explicit permission - Port this resource pack or its assets to **Minecraft Bedrock Edition** - Include unedited assets from this pack in your own resource pack without permission - Use assets from this pack in a **paid product** or behind a **paywall** without explicit permission --- ### 📌 Credit Required If you use assets from this resource pack, proper credit is required: **Azu’s Enhanced Zombie Variants** by **Azu / AZUHKAI** with a link to an official project page (Modrinth, CurseForge, or PlanetMinecraft). The creator has the final say on how these terms are applied and interpreted.
